title: Minimod
description: Improves the game without changing vanilla gameplay. Simplicity, stability, and comfort — all you need.
body:
![Fun for everyone — even Ghasts!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d87b7c8e7588666f94467ec77467c73a6161d7c1.jpeg)Minimod

With Minimod, even Ghasts crack a smile!

📌 General Info

- 🧱 Minecraft Version: 1.21.3-1.21.8
- ⚙️ Mod Loader: Fabric  
- 🧩 Modpack Type: Client-side only (with one optional server-supported feature)  
- 📦 Purpose: Enhances vanilla gameplay with quality-of-life features for survival, building, and communication

> 🗣️ All mods are client-side only, except for Simple Voice Chat, which requires server-side support to function. If the server doesn’t support it, the mod stays inactive without causing issues.


🧩 What's Included

- Simple Voice Chat – in-game voice communication (requires server support)  
- JourneyMap – minimap and full-screen world map  
- Litematica + Printer – schematic-based building with holograms and auto-placement  
- AppleSkin – hunger and saturation HUD info  
- Sodium + Iris – performance boost and shader support  
- Fabric API, MaLiLib, Text Placeholder API – required libraries

🕹️ How to Use

Simple Voice Chat  
Press V to open the voice chat menu. Works only on servers that have the mod installed.

JourneyMap  
Press M to open the map. You can set waypoints, view biomes, caves, and other players.

Litematica  
Press M or Alt + M to open the menu. Load a schematic to see a hologram of the build.  
Press Tab to toggle printer mode (auto-placement). Works only in Creative or on servers that allow it.

AppleSkin  
Works automatically. Displays hunger, saturation, and food effects in the HUD.

Sodium + Iris  
Run in the background. Iris enables shaders via the video settings menu.

⚠️ Notes

- If both JourneyMap and Litematica use M, go to Settings → Controls and change one of them  
- Printer mode only works in Creative or on servers that allow it  
- Voice Chat requires server-side support to function — otherwise, it stays inactive


👥 Why should you choose Our Modpack?
/
For which people is our modpack best suited?

- Players who want quality-of-life features without changing vanilla gameplay 
- Builders who use schematics  
- SMP and vanilla server players  
- Anyone who wants a map, voice chat (when available), better FPS, and nothing bloated
- Optimized for low-end PCs smooth performance with Sodium, shaders optional.
